title: OIDC Claims filtering in Gateway policies
raw_changelog: Gateway now supports OIDC Claims as a selector in Firewall, Resolver, and Egress policies.
before_text:
## Gateway Policy Selectors

| Selector | Available In |
|----------|-------------|
| Application | Firewall, Resolver |
| User Email | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
| User Group | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
| Device Posture | Firewall |
after_text:
## Gateway Policy Selectors

| Selector | Available In |
|----------|-------------|
| Application | Firewall, Resolver |
| User Email | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
| User Group | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
| Device Posture | Firewall |
| OIDC Claims | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
diff_text:
--- before
+++ after
@@ -6,3 +6,4 @@
 | User Group | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |
 | Device Posture | Firewall |
+| OIDC Claims | Firewall, Resolver, Egress |

ground_truth.action_required: No action required. New OIDC Claims selector available for identity-based policies.
